news.t: US, Mexico set three rounds of trade deal talks without Canada
USMCA Is the Next Big Trade Issue. It's Critical For Mexico.
Mexico Posts $4.52 Billion April Trade Surplus
House lawmakers introducing bill to toughen US ban on Chinese vehicles
Auto groups urges Trump to extend trade deal with Mexico, Canada
Bank of Mexico Ends Easing Cycle With Interest-Rate Cut
Mexico Faces Trade Trouble With Trump. Stocks Are Still Up.
Brazil, Mexico Provide Safe Haven Amid Middle East Tumult: Charts
Mexico and Canada Stocks Are Through the Roof. What Trade War?
Trump announces significant 30% tariffs against Mexico, EU to begin next month

holdings.infoBox: EWW is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are GRUPO MEXICO B stock at 14.73%, Grupo Financiero Banorte at 10.67%, FOMENTO ECONOMICO MEXICANO at 8.54%, AMERICA MOVIL B at 8.52%, and CEMEX CPO at 4.58%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Mexico ETF (EWW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Mexico IMI 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of Mexican firms. EWW was launched on Mar 12, 1996 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: US, Mexico set three rounds of trade deal talks without Canada
data.text: The Trump administration's trade agency ‌said on Wednesday it will kick off the first of three negotiating rounds with Mexico this week to revamp the North American trade agreement, but made no mentio...

data.title: USMCA Is the Next Big Trade Issue. It's Critical For Mexico.
data.text: The U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement, or USMCA, affects $2 trillion in trade and is crucial for all three economies.

data.title: Mexico Posts $4.52 Billion April Trade Surplus
data.text: Exports of manufactured goods increased by 34% to $65.69 billion, mining exports rose 71% to $2.08 billion, and agricultural exports edged up 0.1% to $2.23 billion.

data.title: House lawmakers introducing bill to toughen US ban on Chinese vehicles
data.text: Two members of the U.S. House of ​Representatives on Monday will introduce ‌legislation to toughen a U.S. government ban on Chinese ​automakers from entering ​the American market just before ⁠Presiden...

data.title: Auto groups urges Trump to extend trade deal with Mexico, Canada
data.text: Major auto trade groups on ​Thursday urged the Trump ‌administration to extend a free trade deal with ​both Mexico and ​Canada, saying it was ⁠crucial for U.S. ​vehicle production as North ​America fa...

data.title: Bank of Mexico Ends Easing Cycle With Interest-Rate Cut
data.text: The board of governors voted 3-2 to reduce the overnight interest-rate target by a quarter of a percentage point to 6.5%, a four-year low.

data.title: Mexico Faces Trade Trouble With Trump. Stocks Are Still Up.
data.text: The U.S. indictment of a Mexican political figure for drug trafficking complicates Claudia Sheinbaum's relationship with the Trump administration.

data.title: Brazil, Mexico Provide Safe Haven Amid Middle East Tumult: Charts
data.text: ETFs tracking Brazil and Mexico are showing encouraging technical indicators.

data.title: ETF Edge: A fundamental shift in international investing as geopolitical concerns swing markets
data.text: Political and economic tensions, domestic headlines, currency flows and the Federal Reserve have all combined to reignite the “United States vs. international” investing debate.

data.title: Mexico and Canada Stocks Are Through the Roof. What Trade War?
data.text: Mexico's President Claudia Sheinbaum has sweet-talked U.S. President Donald Trump while Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has used tougher talk. Both markets have outperformed.

data.title: Emerging markets are an AI play at a huge discount, says HSBC's Alastair Pinder
data.text: Alastair Pinder, HSBC Head of EM/Global Equity Strategist, joins 'Closing Bell Overtime'  to talk the growth in emerging markets.

data.title: Trump announces significant 30% tariffs against Mexico, EU to begin next month
data.text: President Trump imposes new 30% tariffs on Mexican and EU imports effective August 1, warning that any retaliatory measures will be matched and added to the base rate

data.title: Trump rounds out key tariff threats with letters to EU and Mexico
data.text: President Donald Trump on Saturday announced 30% tariffs on the European Union and on Mexico, cementing a new high level of levies with key trading partners ahead of an Aug. 1 implementation.

data.title: Trump Imposes 30% Tariffs On EU And Mexico
data.text: President Donald Trump announced Saturday his administration is imposing 30% tariffs on imports from the European Union and Mexico, hiking up the tariff rate for two of the U.S.'s biggest trading part...

data.title: Trump announces 30% tariff on imports from EU
data.text: Donald Trump has announced he will impose a 30% tariff on imports from the European Union from August.

data.title: The U.S. will charge a 30% tariff on the European Union and Mexico effective Aug. 1, President Trump said in letters to the leaders of each trading partner, posted on Truth Social on Saturday morning
data.text: The U.S. will charge a 30% tariff on the European Union and Mexico effective Aug. 1, President Trump said in letters to the leaders of each trading partner, posted on Truth Social on Saturday morning.

data.title: Trump announces 30% tariffs on EU and Mexico
data.text: President Donald Trump revealed the new rates in letters to European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen and Mexico's president Claudia Sheinbaum.

data.title: 'Fast Money' traders talk tariff whiplash out of Washington
data.text: The 'Fast Money' traders talk volatility in the market as tariff whiplash hits Washington.

data.title: US stocks today: Wall Street trims losses as Trump delays Mexico tariffs for a month

data.title: ETFs that buy stocks in Mexico, Canada, China drop after Trump's tariff threat
data.text: ETFs that invest in stocks in Canada, Mexico and China were falling Tuesday, after President-elect Donald Trump warned about new tariffs

data.title: As critical elections loom, poll-based investing is a ‘dangerous strategy,' chart shows
